Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

STT 2, 235 [Namburbu][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[x] ⸢BURU₅.ḪABRUD.DA⸣-[MEŠ x] UGU LU₂ GUBzu [...]

(o 1) [...] rock-partridges appear [...] top of a man [...] that [...] will be squandered. (If) rock-partridges settle on top of a man [...].

o 22

[x] ⸢BI⸣ BIRaḫ * KI.MIN<(BURU₅.ḪABRUD.DA-MEŠ)> ina UGU NA in-⸢ne₂⸣-[en-du ...]

o 33

⸢NAM⸣.BUR₂.BI ḪUL BURU₅.ḪABRUD.DAmušen ša₂ ⸢ina⸣ [...]

(o 3) Apotropaic ritual for the evil of rock-partridges that settle on [...]. Its ritual: You place a censer [...]. You libate first-class beer. You take a male and a female [...]. [...] qēmu-flour (and) isqūqu-flour into water [...].

o 44

⸢in⸣-ne₂-en!(BAD-)[du] DU₃.DU₃-BI NIG₂.[NA ...]

o 55

[x x] x x x ⸢GARan⸣ KAŠ SAG BALqi₂ [...]

o 66

NITA₂ u MUNUS⸢ti ta⸣-[ṣa-bat ZI₃].DA ZI₃.KUM ana ⸢A⸣-[MEŠ ...]

o 77

⸢SU LU₂ tu⸣-ka-⸢par⸣ MUŠEN-MEŠ ša₂-⸢tu?⸣-[nu ...]

(o 7) You wipe the man's body clean. [...] those birds.

o 88

⸢MUŠEN⸣-MEŠ ⸢šu⸣-[nu]-⸢tu₂ NA⸣ [...] IL₂-[šu₂-nu-ti ...]

(o 8) The man lifts those same birds [...].

o 99

⸢NITA₂⸣ ina ŠU-MIN ⸢15⸣-[šu₂ ...]

(o 9) [...] the male in his right hand, [...].

o 1010

EN₂ dUTU MAN ⸢AN⸣[e ...]

(o 10) Incantation: Šamaš, king of heaven [...]!

o 1111

SIPA ṣal-[mat] ⸢SAG⸣.[DU ...]

(o 11) Shepherd of the black-headed people [...]!

o 1212

[muš-na]-⸢mir AN?⸣[e? ...]

(o 12) Illuminator of heaven [...]!

o 1313

[...]

(o 13) [...].

o 1414

[...] x [...]

(o 14) [...] ... [...].

o 1515

⸢re⸣-[me-ne₂-ta-ma ...]

(o 15) You are merciful and [...].

o 1616

⸢NU⸣-[ka ...]

(o 16) [...] your effigy, [...].

o 1717

ad-⸢ra⸣-[ku ...]

(o 17) I am afraid, [...].
